__main__.ruter_innhold.name: ruter_innhold
code: Denne siden viser de viktigste URL-ene i eksempelet og hvordan de kan åpnes direkte eller brukes som fragmentvisninger.
Alle lenkene over er delbare og kan åpnes direkte i browseren.

__main__.hjem_legacy.name: hjem_legacy
code: Fire saker har under to timer igjen før svarfrist.
Kompakte komponenter for dashboard, saksflyt og adminflater.
Filteret kan skjule alle rader utan at layouten hopper.
Skriv en kort tittel for saken.
Bruk kundenavnet slik det står i avtalen.
Nordlys AS trenger svar før SLA-fristen løper ut.
Svarfrist er satt til to timer.

Svar kunden før saken eskaleres til teamleder.
Saken trenger svar før fristen løper ut.
Nordlys AS har tre åpne saker og bruker SSO mot egen identitetsleverandør.
Bekreft feilmeldingen, be om tidspunkt og legg ved status for innloggingssystemet.
Sjekk siste innlogging, SSO-konfigurasjon og eventuelle rate limit-hendelser.
Denne boksen styres av Norscode-generert script.
Modalen er styrt av standard Norscode-script.

__main__.bruker_innhold.name: bruker_innhold
code: Kort visning av en server-rendret detaljside.
Detaljvisning som kan server-rendres som full side eller fragment.
URL-en bærer identiteten, og fragmentet bærer innholdet.

__main__.artikkel_innhold.name: artikkel_innhold
code: Kort visning av en server-rendret artikkel.
Detaljvisning som kan server-rendres som full side eller fragment.
Path-parametere kan brukes for å velge identitet og query-parametere for visning.

__main__.artikler_innhold.name: artikler_innhold
code: Denne samlesiden viser hvordan path-baserte detaljer kan henge sammen med fullside og fragment-svar.
Bruk lenkene under for å åpne en detaljside.

std.frontend.ui_stilark.name: ui_stilark
code: .state-panel{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;border:1px solid var(--nc-border);border-left:4px solid var(--nc-primary);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);background:var(--nc-surface);padding:14px 16px;margin:12px 0;box-shadow:var(--nc-shadow);}.state-panel h2{margin:0;font-size:17px;}.state-panel p{margin:4px 0 0;color:var(--nc-muted);}.state-panel__actions{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;}.state-panel__action{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;min-height:32px;padding:0 10px;border:1px solid var(--nc-border);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);background:#f8fafc;color:var(--nc-ink);font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;}.state-panel-warning{border-left-color:var(--nc-warning);background:#fff8eb;}.state-panel-danger{border-left-color:var(--nc-danger);background:#fff1f0;}.state-panel-success{border-left-color:var(--nc-success);background:#f3fbf7;}

.filterbar{display:flex;align-items:end;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:12px 0;}.bulkbar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:12px 0;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid var(--nc-border);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);background:#eef3f7;}.bulkbar__status{color:var(--nc-muted);font-size:13px;font-weight:800;}.density{display:grid;gap:10px;}.density-compact{gap:8px;}.density-compact .stat-card,.density-compact .summary-box,.density-compact .detail-panel,.density-compact .empty-panel{padding:12px;}.density-compact .data-table th,.density-compact .data-table td{padding:7px 10px;}.density-compact .status-card{padding:8px 10px;}.density-compact .meta-row{grid-template-columns:96px minmax(0,1fr);}.density-compact .page-link{min-width:30px;min-height:30px;}.tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;align-items:center;border-bottom:1px solid var(--nc-border);margin:12px 0;overflow:auto;}.tab-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;min-height:38px;padding:0 12px;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;color:var(--nc-muted);font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;}.tab-link.is-active{border-bottom-color:var(--nc-primary);color:var(--nc-primary);}.segmented{display:inline-flex;border:1px solid var(--nc-border);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);overflow:hidden;background:var(--nc-surface);}.segment{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:34px;padding:0 12px;color:var(--nc-ink);text-decoration:none;font-weight:650;border-right:1px solid var(--nc-border);white-space:nowrap;}.segment:last-child{border-right:0}.segment.is-active{background:var(--nc-primary);color:var(--nc-primary-ink);}

.status-board{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:12px;margin:16px 0;align-items:start;}.status-column{display:grid;gap:10px;min-width:0;border:1px solid var(--nc-border);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);background:#f8fafc;padding:12px;}.status-column__header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}.status-column__header h2{margin:0;font-size:16px;}.status-column__count{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-width:28px;min-height:24px;padding:0 8px;border-radius:999px;background:var(--nc-surface);border:1px solid var(--nc-border);font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:var(--nc-muted);}.status-column__body{display:grid;gap:8px;}.status-card{display:grid;gap:4px;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid var(--nc-border);border-left:4px solid var(--nc-primary);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);background:var(--nc-surface);color:var(--nc-ink);text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(23,32,42,.05);}.status-card strong{font-size:14px;}.status-card span{color:var(--nc-muted);font-size:13px;}.status-card-warning{border-left-color:var(--nc-warning);}.status-card-danger{border-left-color:var(--nc-danger);}.status-card-success{border-left-color:var(--nc-success);}

.filter-field,.form-field{display:grid;gap:6px;min-width:220px;}.filter-field label,.form-field label{font-size:13px;color:var(--nc-muted);font-weight:650;}.form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:12px;}.filter-field input,input,select,textarea{border:1px solid var(--nc-border);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);padding:9px 10px;background:var(--nc-surface);color:var(--nc-ink);font:inherit;}textarea{min-height:88px;resize:vertical;}.field-help,.field-error{margin:0;font-size:13px;}.field-help{color:var(--nc-muted);}.field-error{color:var(--nc-danger);font-weight:750;}.form-field:has(.field-error) input,.form-field:has(.field-error) select,.form-field:has(.field-error) textarea{border-color:var(--nc-danger);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(180,35,24,.10);}.error-summary{display:grid;gap:8px;margin:12px 0;padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid #f0b4ae;border-left:4px solid var(--nc-danger);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);background:#fff1f0;}.error-summary h2{margin:0;font-size:16px;}.error-summary ul{margin:0;padding-left:18px;}.error-summary a{color:var(--nc-danger);font-weight:750;}.check-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-weight:650;color:var(--nc-ink);}.check-row input{width:18px;height:18px;}.form-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:12px;}

.table-wrap{overflow:auto;border:1px solid var(--nc-border);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);background:var(--nc-surface);}.data-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}.data-table th,.data-table td{padding:10px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--nc-border);text-align:left;}.data-table th{font-size:13px;color:var(--nc-muted);background:#f1f4f7;}.data-table__actions{width:1%;white-space:nowrap;}.table-actions{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;gap:6px;}.table-action{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:30px;height:30px;border:1px solid var(--nc-border);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);background:var(--nc-surface);color:var(--nc-ink);font-weight:800;text-decoration:none;line-height:1;cursor:pointer;}.table-action:hover{border-color:var(--nc-primary);color:var(--nc-primary);background:#eef8fb;}.table-empty-row td{text-align:center;color:var(--nc-muted);padding:22px 12px;}.table-empty-row strong{display:block;color:var(--nc-ink);margin-bottom:4px;}.table-empty-row p{margin:0;}.pagination{display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:12px;}.page-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-width:34px;min-height:34px;padding:0 10px;border:1px solid var(--nc-border);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);background:var(--nc-surface);color:var(--nc-ink);text-decoration:none;font-weight:650;}.page-link.is-active{background:var(--nc-primary);border-color:var(--nc-primary);color:var(--nc-primary-ink);}.sr-only{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;padding:0;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0,0,0,0);white-space:nowrap;border:0;}

@media(max-width:640px){.table-wrap{overflow:visible;border:0;background:transparent;}.data-table,.data-table thead,.data-table tbody,.data-table tr,.data-table td{display:block;}.data-table{border-collapse:separate;}.data-table thead{display:none;}.data-table tbody{display:grid;gap:10px;}.data-table tr{border:1px solid var(--nc-border);border-radius:var(--nc-radius);background:var(--nc-surface);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(23,32,42,.05);overflow:hidden;}.data-table td{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(88px,34%) minmax(0,1fr);gap:8px;align-items:center;border-bottom:1px solid var(--nc-border);padding:9px 10px;}.data-table td:last-child{border-bottom:0;}.data-table td:before{content:attr(data-label);color:var(--nc-muted);font-size:12px;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;}.data-table__actions{width:auto;white-space:normal;}.data-table__actions .table-actions{justify-content:flex-start;}.table-empty-row{box-shadow:none;}.table-empty-row td{display:block;text-align:left;}.table-empty-row td:before{display:none;}}

code: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; img-src 'self' https: data:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:

std.web.response_finalize_strict.name: response_finalize_strict
code: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'
